description: A small pouch with a hook-and-loop flap at the top.  Allows storing miscellanious stuff underneath your plate carrier or ballistic vest.  Can attach to hook-and-loop mounts.

description: A thin panel with a large hook-and-loop surface and a slim PALS grid.  Can attach to the bottom edge of plate carriers and many ballistic vests and provide three extra slots for MOLLE pouches.

variants.description: A thin panel with a large hook-and-loop surface and a 6×2-cell PALS grid.  Can attach to the bottom edge of plate carriers and many ballistic vests via its hook-and-loop interface, and serve as webbing for extra pouches.  <variant:black>

A thin panel with a large hook-and-loop surface and a 6×2-cell PALS grid.  Can attach to the bottom edge of plate carriers and many ballistic vests via its hook-and-loop interface, and serve as webbing for extra pouches.  <variant:coyote>
